title: Countdown Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Countdown plugin - create and manage multiple countdowns with custom images, fonts, and layouts

enabled.description: Enable or disable the countdown plugin

countdowns.title: Countdowns
countdowns.description: Manage your countdown entries. Each countdown can have a custom image, name, target date/time, and style overrides.

target_date.title: Target Date
target_date.description: Date to count down to (or count from for 'since' mode)

target_time.title: Target Time
target_time.description: Optional time for sub-day precision (HH:MM, 24h). Switches display to hours/minutes as the event approaches.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: 'until' counts down to the date (Days Until); 'since' counts up from it (Days Since / elapsed)

layout_preset.title: Layout
layout_preset.description: Where to place the image relative to the text. 'text-only' ignores any image; 'image-only' hides text.

text_align.title: Text Align
text_align.description: Horizontal alignment of the countdown name and value within the text area

image_path.title: Image
image_path.description: Optional image displayed alongside this countdown

layout.title: Layout
layout.description: Pixel position and size overrides. Leave at 0 or null to use smart defaults (image on left 1/3, text on right 2/3).

image_width.title: Image Width
image_width.description: Image render width in pixels (0 = auto: 1/3 of display width)

image_height.title: Image Height
image_height.description: Image render height in pixels (0 = auto: full display height)

name_x.title: Name X
name_x.description: Name text X position (null = auto-center in text area)

name_y.title: Name Y
name_y.description: Name text Y position (null = auto: upper 1/3)

value_x.title: Value X
value_x.description: Countdown value text X position (null = auto-center in text area)

value_y.title: Value Y
value_y.description: Countdown value text Y position (null = auto: lower 2/3)

style.title: Style
style.description: Per-countdown font and color overrides. null values inherit global settings.

font_size.title: Value Font Size
font_size.description: Countdown value font size in pixels (null = use global)

font_color.title: Value Color
font_color.description: Countdown value text color [R, G, B] (null = use global)

name_font_size.title: Name Font Size
name_font_size.description: Countdown name font size in pixels (null = use global)

name_font_color.title: Name Color
name_font_color.description: Countdown name text color [R, G, B] (null = use global)

background_color.title: Background Color
background_color.description: Background color [R, G, B] (null = use global)

font_family.title: Default Font Family
font_family.description: Global font family for countdown text (can be overridden per countdown)

font_size.title: Default Value Font Size
font_size.description: Global font size for countdown values in pixels

font_color.title: Default Value Color
font_color.description: Global RGB color for countdown value text [R, G, B]

name_font_size.title: Default Name Font Size
name_font_size.description: Global font size for countdown names in pixels

name_font_color.title: Default Name Color
name_font_color.description: Global RGB color for countdown name text [R, G, B]

background_color.title: Default Background Color
background_color.description: Global RGB background color [R, G, B]

display_duration.title: Display Duration
display_duration.description: How long to display each countdown in seconds before rotating

show_expired.title: Show Expired
show_expired.description: Show 'until' countdowns that have already passed (displayed as 'Nd ago')

fit_to_display.title: Fit Images to Display
fit_to_display.description: Automatically scale images to fit their allocated display area

preserve_aspect_ratio.title: Preserve Aspect Ratio
preserve_aspect_ratio.description: Preserve image aspect ratio when scaling
